name: @mariozechner/pi
description: CLI tool for managing vLLM deployments on GPU pods

scripts.build: vp exec tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && vp exec shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && vp exec shx cp src/models.json dist/ && vp exec shx cp -r scripts dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: vp run clean && vp run build

author: Mario Zechner
